meta.title: Why the U.S. Can Do Better in Afghanistan than the Soviets
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz discusses the war in Afghanistan and possible future developments. The United States has now had forces in Afghanistan for more days than the Soviets did in the 1980s.
